case_title: GRAMMENS, EDWARD VS ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27233, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAMMENS, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC. $2,110.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,132.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRAMMENS, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC. $2,110.00 PRINCIPAL, $172.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,282.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 027233 ON 7/16/03 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. $150 OF THE COST IS FOR ATTORNEY FEES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,110.00 FILED BY GRAMMENS, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ERNST, CARL MARITIME RECREATION CENTER INC.
